rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks inside `annex agree {** ... **};` for component types or implementations as needed
Use `assign` only in implementation scope when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or declared auxiliary variable
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes for general contracts, and in implementation annexes for implementation-level bindings
Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless the model exposes explicit typed ports or constants
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Write output dependency guarantees that relate visible outputs to visible inputs
Use case-provided thresholds and legal visible feature names in contracts
Treat each annex agree block as scoped to its owning component declaration
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `assume "label": expression;` and `guarantee "label": expression;` for contracts
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for equations and `const name : type = value;` for constants
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not encode AADL property associations as AGREE expressions without explicit typed ports or constants
